content:
# Pictory vs InVideo vs Fliki: Best AI Video Creator 2026

AI video creators make professional video content from text, scripts, and existing content. Let's compare the three leading platforms!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: The Content Repurposing Leader

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] excels at turning long-form content into short, shareable videos.

### Pictory Strengths
- **Text-to-video**: Turn scripts and articles into videos
- **Auto-highlights**: Find the best parts of your content
- **AI voiceovers**: Professional-sounding narration

### Pictory Weaknesses
- **Template limits**: Free plan has restrictions

**Try Pictory**: https://pictory.ai

---

## Comparison Table

| Feature | [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] | InVideo | Fliki |
|---------|-----------|---------|-------|
| Text-to-Video | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Templates | Good | Excellent | Good |
| Voiceovers | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Price | $19+/mo | $20+/mo | $28+/mo |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Content repurposing**: Choose [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]
- **Template variety**: Try InVideo
- **Quick clips**: Go with Fliki

Want more comparisons? Check out [[link:/blog/runway-vs-pika-vs-synthesia-best-ai-avatar-video-tool-2026|Runway vs Pika vs Synthesia]]
